title: The Everything Code Dashboard
description: Self-updating global liquidity & business-cycle dashboard. Companion to The Exponential Age (dashboard id 'ea'); the two are designed to be read together against a shared data contract.
reading_order: 1. data/summary.json — headline (GMI Total Global Liquidity Index), a computed `signals` block (lead/lag relationships with correlations), and a dense per-indicator digest with units, trend, source-verified freshness (read first)
2. data/data.json — full raw series (the daily Total Liquidity line, daily Global M2, + ~45 macro leaves) when you need the shape of a specific curve
